questions.q: How do I register to vote?
questions.a: Visit your local electoral commission website or visit a registration centre with valid ID.
Deadlines vary by election. Typically 30-60 days before election day. Check your local electoral authority.
A government-issued photo ID such as a passport, driver's licence, or national identity card.
Polling hours vary by jurisdiction, typically 7am–8pm on election day.
Preliminary results are usually available on election night; official results are certified within days or weeks.
Ballots are counted by trained electoral officials. Results are verified against tallies from multiple counting centres.
